key_facts: Single member Delaware LLC, disregarded entity for tax
Revenue from royalties and franchise fees in Domestic Territories
Fiscal year ends Sunday closest to Dec 31
All cash restricted under Parent debt agreements
Lower rates may apply for area development, sales initiatives, relocation/new store incentives
Revenue recognized when items delivered/carried out
Payments due within 7 days (US), at least monthly (American Territories)
$1.8M from American Territories in each year
Only non-resident withholding taxes: $0.4M each year
2018 7.5yr Notes and 2015 10yr Notes anticipated repayment: October 2025 — DPI expects to refinance
No outstanding borrowings on variable funding notes at year-end
Must distribute excess cash to Parent under operating agreement
Fee formula changed Sept 2022: $14M base + $4.7K per $100K retained collections
2022 non-cash capital contribution: $0.5M (note receivable from refranchising)
Q4 2023: sold supply chain center building for $14.9M; gain of $13.5M
No subsequent events requiring recognition or disclosure (evaluated through March 21, 2025)
Restricted cash equivalents at Level 1 fair value
$14.4M restricted cash equivalents at end-2023; none at end-2024
Michigan LLC, subsidiary of Domino's Inc.
Four business activities: company stores, supply chain, US franchise royalties/fees, international franchise royalties/fees
Dec 2024: $144M for debt service + $51.2M interest reserve + $0.2M other + $80.9M ad fund
Dec 2023: $149.1M for debt service + $51.6M interest reserve + $0.2M other + $88.2M ad fund
FIFO basis, lower of cost or NRV
Company-owned stores evaluated on operating market basis
Same Notes as DPF (both entities guarantee)
Fair values generally below principal (rates above market for older notes)
Upcoming maturity: 2018 7.5yr Notes ($403M) and 2015 10yr Notes ($742M) anticipated repayment October 2025 — $1.145B refinancing needed
Finance lease assets net: $56.5M (land/buildings $80M, equipment $4.6M, less $28.1M depreciation)
2004 Equity Incentive Plan: 15.6M shares authorized, 2.1M available for grant
458,294 stock options outstanding at end-2024, weighted avg exercise $306.85
Options exercised 2024: 270,424 options at avg $133.21, intrinsic value $93.5M
